summary: This is a minimal announcement post from April 1, 2005, directing readers to the conclusion of Joel's 'The Road to FogBugz' series. The post contains virtually no substantive content of its own, serving purely as a link to another article. At only 9 words, it functions as a blog-era equivalent of a tweet or status update.
key_points: Directs readers to the final installment of 'The Road to FogBugz' series
The word 'shocking' suggests the conclusion contains a surprising reveal or twist
Published on April 1st, which may indicate the 'shocking' label is tongue-in-cheek
money_quotes: Today, the shocking conclusion of The Road To FogBugz.
key_insight: This is a stub announcement post with no independent analytical content, serving only to link readers to the conclusion of a serialized article about FogBugz development.
